# sdwan_tenant_feature_template (Resource)

This resource can manage a tenant feature template.
  - Minimum SD-WAN Manager version: `15.0.0`

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sdwan_tenant_feature_template" "example" {
  name         = "Example"
  description  = "My Example"
  device_types = ["vedge-C8000V"]
  tenant_organization_name = [
    {
      organization_name    = "example_org"
      tier_name            = "example"
      maximum_vpns_allowed = 123
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) The description of the feature template
- `device_types` (Set of String) List of supported device types
  - Choices: `vedge-C8000V`, `vedge-C8300-1N1S-4T2X`, `vedge-C8300-1N1S-6T`, `vedge-C8300-2N2S-6T`, `vedge-C8300-2N2S-4T2X`, `vedge-C8500-12X4QC`, `vedge-C8500-12X`, `vedge-C8500-20X6C`, `vedge-C8500L-8S4X`, `vedge-C8200-1N-4T`, `vedge-C8200L-1N-4T`
- `name` (String) The name of the feature template

### Optional

- `tenant_organization_name` (Attributes List) Onboards the tenant on the device (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tenant_organization_name))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the feature template
- `template_type` (String) The template type
- `version` (Number) The version of the feature template

<a id="nestedatt--tenant_organization_name"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tenant_organization_name`

Optional:

- `maximum_vpns_allowed` (Number) Maximum VPNs allowed
  - Range: `1`-`336`
- `optional` (Boolean) Indicates if list item is considered optional.
- `organization_name` (String) Organization Name
- `organization_name_variable` (String) Variable name
- `tier_name` (String) Tier name

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import sdwan_tenant_feature_template.example "f6b2c44c-693c-4763-b010-895aa3d236bd"
```
